phase: P0.6 OpenAI live API — direct adapter call (bypasses NSSM)
purpose: Verify adapter code works against live OpenAI before NSSM service restart picks up the max_completion_tokens fix.
secrets_handling: OPENAI_API_KEY loaded from C:\iuf\secrets\openalice_llm.env, never echoed; only its char-length (164) was logged.

result.summary_excerpt: AI 在半導體是創造生成式 AI、機器學習與高效能運算的核心硬件...（Traditional Chinese theme summary, ~250 tokens）

bug_found_and_fixed.symptom: First NSSM-driven E2E (job 018c78e2) returned HTTP 400 from OpenAI: 'Unsupported parameter: max_tokens is not supported with this model. Use max_completion_tokens instead.'
bug_found_and_fixed.root_cause: Adapter sent max_tokens, but gpt-5.4-mini is a reasoning model that requires max_completion_tokens.
bug_found_and_fixed.fix: openai_backend.py _chat() now sends max_completion_tokens always; reasoning models (gpt-5*/o1*/o3*/o4*) also get temperature stripped (those models reject explicit temperature).

next_step: NSSM service still has OLD adapter code in memory; needs admin restart for service to pick up the fix. Then NSSM-driven E2E will report provider=openai instead of falling back to rule-template.
